sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111345" key="filoniknose/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλονῑκ-νοσέω</orth>, <sense id="n111345.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be usually sick,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
